---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or a new capability
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem / motivation**
What are you trying to do, and where does Quellgeist fall short today?

**Proposed direction**
What you'd like to see. If it fits a later wave (see the
[rolling-wave plan](../../docs/quellgeist-plan-rolling-wave.md)), say which.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you weighed, and why this one.

**Fit with the theses**
Does it preserve the project's core commitments — cite-or-abstain, model-agnostic,
read-only/least-privilege tools, and a deterministic keyless gate?
